category_sources: source_facts.description says gSOAP is a SOAP stub and skeleton compiler for C and C++; official SourceForge code page describes it as a development toolkit for Web Services and XML data bindings for C and C++.
display_name_sources: Official Genivia documentation page and SourceForge project use the name gSOAP.
docs_sources: Official Genivia documentation page lists the gSOAP user guide and related XML data binding, DOM, XML-RPC/JSON, and plugin documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge gSOAP Toolkit Code page is the project source-control browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SOAP code generation for C/C++; official SourceForge code page describes Web Services and XML data bindings for C and C++.
